texto: A writer cannot really grasp what he has written. It is not like a building or a sculpture
autor: it cannot be seen whole. It is only a kind of smoke seized and printed on a page.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it cannot be seen whole. It is only a kind of smoke seized and printed on a page.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “A writer cannot really grasp what he has written. It is not like a building or a sculpture” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, james-salter, burning-the-days-recollection pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de burning-the-days-recollection.
